entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Escaped aswell, this was a good challenge.

entry.title: Re: Can I assign more than one course at a time to a user...
entry.content:
Hi Lauren,

I would group the 50 Procurement courses into a single folder called Procurement Training, or something similar, and assign the content at that level, i.e. to the group object.  When the users then open the Learner View tab and click on the Procurement Training entry, they will see a list of the course objects.  They can then click one of them to start that object.

Alternatively, you could create a folder structure that groups courses by Role and then assign those folder objects to the relevant user groups.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Inner join with AND , OR and LIKE in where clause sel...
entry.content:
Dear Vieet,

Have you been able to solve the problem yet?
I've identified a problem in your code: in my opinion you're using incorrect nesting in the Where clause of the second Selectstatement.
I would rewrite the clause as follows:
where saknr = @LT_acdoca-gkont
and spras = 'E'
and (
txt50 like '%TDS%' or
txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' or
txt50 like '%GBI%' or
txt50 like '%CUF%'
).
It's possible that your last statement isn't working correctly either, because then skat~spras = 'E'probably only affects the first LIKE.
Try the following solution:
SELECT acdoca~rbukrs,
acdoca~gjahr,
acdoca~belnr,
acdoca~wsl,
acdoca~augbl,
acdoca~gkont,
skat~spras,
skat~saknr,
skat~txt50
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_acdoca_skat)
FROM acdoca AS acdoca
INNER JOIN skat AS skat
ON skat~saknr = acdoca~gkont
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_bsad
WHERE acdoca~rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs
AND acdoca~gjahr = @LT_bsad-gjahr
AND acdoca~augbl = @LT_bsad-augbl
AND acdoca~rldnr = '0L'
AND (
skat~txt50 LIKE '%TDS%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%CASH DISCOUNT%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%GBI%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%CUF%'
)
AND skat~spras = 'E'.
I hope my thoughts will help you.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cds parameter length getting doubled in PaPM
entry.content:
Dear Nagaraosunkara,

Unfortunately, since I don't know exactly what your CDS-View looks like, I can't say exactly what the problem is.
To me, the problem points to an inconsistent interpretation between CDS-View and PaPM.
Could you please post a code snippet of your CDS-View, so I can take a closer look?
Which parameter length annotation in CDS-View did you use to define the length, the following @Consumption.parameter.length?

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Extract ECC
entry.content:
We have a requirement to extract the data from SAP ECC , which involves multiple tables involved in it around 10 tables and also involve loop logic from one table to another. What is the best approach to perform this ?

Is there any other way beyond ABAP program? I mean can we write SQL without installing any other tool?

Note : Client doesn't allow any external tools like BODS and all. Because they are going to decommission SAP soon .

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud, what is the solution/process fo...
entry.content:
Hello @Dhabir 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has no standard excise duty calculation and reporting functionality, such as those required for UK spirits manufacturers managing bonded and unbonded stock. To achieve compliance with HMRC regulations, consider the following approaches:

  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC): While DRC supports VAT reporting and Making Tax Digital (MTD) submissions to HMRC, it does not cover excise duties.
    • Custom Extensions via SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP): Develop custom applications or extensions using SAP BTP to manage excise duty calculations and reporting. This approach facilitates integration with external systems and customisation to meet specific regulatory requirements.
    Apply to Supply
    • Third-Party Tax Compliance Solutions: Integrate with certified third-party solutions that specialise in excise duty management and HMRC compliance. These solutions can connect to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via APIs or SAP BTP.

Visit this below SAP Link SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, excise tax management by Vistex 

https://www.sap.com/uk/products/financial-management/excise-tax-management.html?

It's important to note that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition offers more extensive capabilities, including support for excise tax management through solutions like Vistex. However, since your focus is on the Public Edition, the above approaches are recommended

Fell free to reach out for further assistance

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Personas MM Flavors script errors
entry.content: Thank you so much for getting back to me. We upgraded Personas to 3.0 SP 19. I tried doing the same thing in the second screen but it did not fix the error.

entry.title: How do I report on Alternative Cost Distribution in Table/Canvas report?
Re: OLAP Processing Error
entry.content:
Hi @DariusSoreata - based on what appear in the error log, it looks like you have a field setup as numeric or decimal but the value stored in that field is actually String value so the tool cannot convert the String value to numeric/decimal.

I don't know which field as it is not mentioned in the log but it looks like field related to User ID.  You will need to troubleshoot this yourselves in the configuration.

entry.title: Re: WFA Starter Packages Not Loading with No import logs...
entry.content:
Hi @sfsapsvsv - there is a known issue with the import somehow it does not refresh the page.  But if you open a new tab and check the load status for the import status, it usually gets imported successfully.

Also, you can also go to the Tables and Columns in the Data Factory configuration to check if there is fact table listed there or not.  If available, that means the template configuration has been imported successfully.  You still need to run initial load manually though.

Thank you

entry.title: I am new in SAP, and need to run MD02_InHouseMaterialPlannedOrde,How to do this?
TreeTable - Retain Selection on collapse and expand
entry.content:
For one of our requirement, we are using sap.ui.table.TreeTable to show the hierarchical data. There is an option to select multiple lines and it is working. However, when a Node is collapsed and expanded again, all the previous selections are not visible. Is there any way to retain the selections ?

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: TreeTable - Retain Selection on collapse and expand
entry.content: Please check this KBA 2886097 - Collapse / expand / search / filter do not retain index state

entry.title: Comments box visible in recruitment dashboard
entry.content:
Hey, just wondering if there is a way to have a requisition comments box visible in the recruitment dashboard. We find the recruiters are using an excel spreadsheet to have visibility of all their reqs in one screen at quick glance. In SF they have to go into each req to see req notes. 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform  SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hi @Abed - when you delete the supervisor hierarchy dimension, it will stay in the "Branches" table and cannot be clear out.  However, it should not affect the site if you ran WFA artifact sync after deleting the hierarchy dimension.  This hierarchy should be gone from the WFA site.

entry.title: Re: Report for Paying Failed invoices
entry.content: We were also looking for such reports, but did not find any. The only option is to manually check the individual invoices.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP Yard Logistics: Visual Business Screen...
entry.content:
Hi @Harshal92 ,

COLLADA (collaborative design activity) Set up -> find in that blog below and please check with SAP for more details.

Having issues to open Yard Cockpit application or Yard Layout Editor.


Sometimes when open Yard Cockpit application, an error shows up with "No map can be found". This is caused by the browser internet settings. SAP Note 2935088 provides the necessary setup to fix it.

How to draw Yard Layouts?


First there are a series of initial setup needed including color, visual object type and shape, etc. Visual Object Type represents the visual image of Storage bins or TUs in yard. The Visual Object Type will be assigned to packaging material type or storage bin type, which helps define the visual image of objects in yard. Each TUs belong to a specific packaging material type and each Storage bins has a storage bin type. Before drawing them, this setup is a prerequisite. For more detail guidance see SAP Note 3000428.

After all the setups are done you can go to Yard Layout Editor to draw the storage bin in yard. To reduce the effort of drawing a big yard, copying form an existing shape of storage bin can be possible. To make the graphical yard look trimmed, a template is provided for creating a list of storage bins.

Please be careful that all the storage bins can be drawn with shape regardless of the bin is empty or not. But only shape of empty bins can be deleted or changed. Once the storage bin is not empty anymore, the shape cannot be deleted or changed.

Credit: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/answers-to-common-yard-logistics-questions/ba-p/13555230

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Personas MM Flavors script errors
entry.content:
I suspect that there may have been some other upgrade than just Personas to SP19. If the underlying screen or theme did not change, then upgrading the Personas SP alone should not have the described effect.

Did you perhaps also upgrade the SAP Basis, S/4HANA release or some other components as well?

entry.title: Re: Production order splitting & Merging in S4Hana Cloud
entry.content: Hello, Production order split function is available in S/4HANA Public edition. Below blog can be a reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/production-order-split/ba-p/14093540

entry.title: Re: SAP PUBLIC CLOUD Recurring journal entry mass posting...
entry.content:
Hi Kunkumasudharshan,

After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer: The feature “upload recurring jorunal entries" is neither available nor planned to be available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. You may request features on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback.

Alice

entry.title: Re: Condition value display negative value.
entry.content: that's definitely correct, IMG- ITEM category -business data -> do NOT tick the checkbox " Returns". Otherwise, condition value of PR00 will make you go crazy !!!

entry.title: Re: Legal Entity Rationalization: A New Strategy Through Early IT Integration
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" 

  1. Lower Administrative Costs: Reducing the number of entities cuts down on redundant processes across finance, HR, and IT.
  2. Greater Operational Efficiency: With fewer entities, it becomes easier to consolidate teams, negotiate better contracts, and streamline operations.
  3. Tax Optimization: Loss-making entities can be merged or restructured to unlock valuable tax offsets.
  4. Improved Compliance and Risk Management: A leaner structure reduces regulatory complexity and enhances governance oversight.
  5. Resource Optimization: Functions like production, marketing, and logistics benefit from better allocation and reduced redundancy.
  6. Strategic Flexibility: Simplified organizations are better positioned to absorb new acquisitions or pivot in response to market shifts. "

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: PR00 value is coming negative in sales order.
entry.content: that's definitely correct, IMG- ITEM category -business data -> do NOT tick the checkbox " Returns". Otherwise, condition value of PR00 will make you go crazy !!!

entry.title: Re: Negative Condition Value despite positive unit price
entry.content: that's definitely correct, IMG- ITEM category -business data -> do NOT tick the checkbox " Returns". Otherwise, condition value of PR00 will make you go crazy !!!

entry.title: Re: Condition value display negative value.
entry.content: you need to go to IMG- ITEM category -business data -> do NOT tick the checkbox " Returns". Otherwise, condition value of PR00 will make you go crazy !!!

entry.title: Natively ABAP Cloud (Clean Core) Add-ons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
This blog highlights the new features introduced in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, as part of the 2408.4 release in December 2024.

Add-ons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Customers implementing or operating SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, in a three-system landscape now have the capability to deploy natively developed and seamlessly deliver clean-core ABAP Cloud partner add-ons within the stack. Yes, as you read, the public cloud now offers the ability for partners to create scalable add-ons, enhancing or extending functional or industry aspects within the public cloud. Best of all, these add-ons are developed following SAP’s ABAP Cloud development methodology applied to the public cloud's principle of extensibility, ensuring they are life-cycle compliant and maintain a clean core. This means they are upgrade-safe.

Until December 2024, packaged ABAP Cloud add-ons were only available for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition. Now, they are natively available as clean-core solutions for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud! The integration of SAP Store publishing, order management, and fulfillment with automated deployment to customers' Public Edition systems makes ABAP Cloud add-ons even more advantageous compared to traditional ABAP Cloud add-ons. We believe this new capability will allow partners to offer our customers ample possibilities to enhance functional and industry-specific areas. Traditionally, SAP has relied on partner expertise to introduce new components or address specific complex processes. This innovation enables partners to further complement SAP solutions with their specialized offerings.

These add-ons are specifically designed for the public cloud, utilizing tools that are natively aligned with public cloud development. Consequently, the add-ons are built to be life-cycle compliant, eliminating the need for remediation after upgrades since they are created using SAP’s extensibility tools for the public cloud.

Even with these state-of-the-art extensibility tools, SAP can certify the add-ons to ensure they meet all the requirements of a certified add-on. This includes, among other criteria: the add-on must run on-stack on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, uninstallation must be supported, the implementation must adhere to the development processes described in the help pages for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, all objects must be located in a registered namespace, and the add-on must successfully pass a security code scan using the provided code scanning tool of ABAP Development Tools, among other.

For partners interested in developing scalable add-ons, SAP offers the central SAP Business Technology Platform service, Landscape Portal, which orchestrates Add-on Assembly Kit as a Service (AAKaaS), Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD), and many other frameworks. With the Landscape Portal, partners can now build, deliver, and maintain their solutions as add-ons, while customers can seamlessly consume these add-on-based partner solutions. For more details, please refer to the following blog by my colleague, Oren Shatil: Extensibility - General Availability of Scalable Solution for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

As detailed in Oren’s blog, SAP is now offering partners a new Test, Demo, and Development (TDD) system that consists of a three-system landscape: Dev, Test & Build, and Showcase. This setup facilitates the development of add-ons in conjunction with an enhanced tool of the " Partner Landscape Portal." More details can be found in Oren's blog.

Add-on process for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: from creation in the partner landscape to deployment in the customer landscape.

What does this mean for customers?
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers can benefit from partner add-ons, gaining additional enhancements or extensions tailored to functional or industry-specific solutions provided by specialized partners.

Customers will be able to browse and purchase these add-ons from the SAP Store. With automated deployment, these solutions can be easily made available in the respective customer systems.

Scalable Scenario for Add-Ons: Customer and Partner Process Using SAP Store.

It is recommended to initially deploy such add-on products in the development system of the customer's three-system landscape. This approach allows the product to be tested and integrated into the customer's environment. Once satisfied with the outcome, the product can be installed across all systems in the customer's three-system landscape using the Deploy Product app included in the Customer Landscape Portal.

Customers will be able to purchase and deploy add-ons directly from the SAP Store.

We believe these new capabilities will help our customers gain more specialized functionality derived from the extensive experience of many partners in the SAP ecosystem. Please note that this functionality has just been introduced, so we expect the number of available add-ons to increase over time.

If you would like to share your experiences with other SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers, feel free to join our online user group. For more information, click here.

I would like to thank my colleagues, Arturo Montes de Oca, Helmut Hofmann, Khaled Musilhy, Winfried Schmitt, Carsten Lessmann, Oren Shatil and Alexey Romanov, for their review and feedback on this blog.

Your insights and opinions are valuable, so please don't hesitate to contribute by commenting on this blog.

More Information on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, release info here
    • Product videos on our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP S/4HANA YouTube playlist
    • SAP S/4HANA PSCC Digital Enablement Wheel here
    • Early Release Webinar Series here
    • Inside SAP S/4HANA Cloud Podcast here
    • openSAP Microlearnings for SAP S/4HANA here
    • Best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, here
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Community: here
    • Feature Scope Description here
    • What’s New here
    • Help Portal Product Page here
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition trial, test, demo, and development (SAP partner access)
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP environment

Follow us via @SAP and #S4HANA or follow @Marco_Valencia

entry.title: 2 simple questions about SAC table
entry.content:
Hi,

Here are two simple questions we want to figure out:

1. Is it possible to sort by 2 measures on a single table?

2. How to filter the rows where the corresponding measure value > 25%?

Thanks for your help.

Regards,

Jason

Chantal

entry.title: Quedada SAP - post SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
¡Hola miembros de la comunidad SAP en Madrid!

¿Que les parece si quedamos nuevamente? Pero esta vez para hablar un poco de lo que fue el SAP Sapphire 2025.

La Quedada SAP en Madrid se llevará a cabo el 29 de mayo de 2025 a las 18:00 hora local en la Cervecería Köln, que esta muy cerca de la nueva oficina de SAP.

La idea es juntarnos y compartir un poco sobre todo lo que es el mundo SAP. En esta ocasion compartir experiencias/opiniones del primer gran evento SAP del año - SAP Sapphire. Aparte de esto, tambien coincide que estas fechas esta @MustafaBensan (SAP Champion) por Madrid y se nos unira.

Por favor, haznos saber si participarás en la quedada haciendo clic en la seccion de RSVP. No tenemos una reserva como tal en el espacio pero es un lugar bastante amplio y podriamos juntar alli un par de mesas. Nota: Cada uno es responsable de comprar su propia comida o bebida si lo desea.

¡Nos vemos pronto!

-----

¡Hola SAP Community members in Madrid!

How about we meet again? But this time to chat about SAP TechEd and Devtoberfest 2024.

The SAP Meetup in Madrid will take place on May 29, 2025, at 18:00 local time at Cerveceria Köln, which is very close to the new SAP office.

The idea is to get together and share a bit about everything in the SAP world. This time around, share our experiences/opinions about the first big SAP event of the year - SAP Sapphire. Also, SAP Champion @MustafaBensan is in town and he will be joining us :-).

Please let us know if you will be participating in the meetup by clicking on the RSVP section. We do not have a reservation in the space, but it is fairly large, and we could put a couple of tables together there. Note: Everyone is responsible for purchasing their own food or drinks if they wish to.

See you soon!

Antonio Maradiaga
Developer Advocate @ SAP

entry.title: Re: Link service contract item to Service Contract templa...
entry.content:
Dear HC,

Service contract template is a new innovation and currently there is no integration with solution order. You could raise an influence sap request to let the SAP development team aware of your requirement.

Regards,

Demi

Abdul Latif

entry.title: why Crystal Reports doesn't support Print Dialog to browser?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I do many search, find some questions about similar problem.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/print-dialog-in-crystal-report/qaq-p/12582149

But doesn't find any solution.

I must export report to PDF to print. Is there any idea to allow show Print Dialog?

Such as this dialog in Chrome, Firefox, Edge etc.

I try to switch PrintMode = "ActiveX" but doesn't work. maybe beacuse ActiveX is not supported in modern browsers.

Please any solution to this problem?

entry.title: Re: I am new in SAP, and need to run MD02_InHouseMaterial...
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to suggest to make the question more specific, for example how to set the material master data, or how to fill in the parameters when execute MD02, etc. 

Before you run MRP for material in transaction code MD02, you must maintain this material as MRP related in material master data, for example MRP Type PD.

When you run MRP in Transaction code MD02, you populate the parameters as you need. Material number and plant code are must. Other parameters may be filled in by default. You may change it accordingly. Below is an example. Press Enter after you confirm these parameters. The system will run MRP for this material and show your the general result.

entry.title: SAP Build App event handler issue
entry.content:
Hey guys

I have configured sap_process_automation_service_user_access destination in my BTP for the instance of Build Process automation and test shows successful & 401. Also, added that destination in control tower's destination in build lobby

I have also created a Web & Mobile application in Sap Build App 

And I have integrated a process (Sap Build Automation) into Sap Build App. 

When I preview my application, I'm encountering an error in SAP Build App: Unknown node id: page:1:component:<ID>:onFocus/onBlur/onKeyPress/onChange when interacting with input fields. The error mentions Abort fetching component for route: "/[appId]/[appName]/[...params]". I don't have any logic configured for these events, can anyone help me identify the cause of this issue?

Thank in advance, 

Giang

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP - post SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content: Thanks for organising, Antonio.  Looking forward to seeing everyone there!

entry.title: Re: S4/HANA Readiness Check Issue
entry.content:
Hi supid_saha1,

The warning talks about notes listed in 2913617 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA.

There are some issues in the readiness check web application to check note status. Since it is just a warning, it will not affect the actual data, if you have got no issues during executing report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA, could you kindly ignore the message and continue your analysis. SAP development support team is working on a fix to the issue.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Test plan edit error "A row already exists with this key"
entry.content: what's the solution manager SPS version please?

entry.title: Exploring SAP Business AI's Role in Cloud ERP: A Look at Business Innovations & Future Trends
entry.content: Join us to gain insights into SAP Business AI’s value in the context of a Cloud ERP strategy. This session aims to develop an understanding of AI-based innovations and how they support the evolving mandates of IT in supporting the business and enabling enterprise transformation. You will get a brief overview of the key AI innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and a sneak peak into the upcoming innovation topics.

entry.title: Quality Control Testing Equipment
entry.content: Hello SAP experts. I have a case for the printing plate, we have to bring out the equipment on which the sample was tested. Based on SAP forums and books, the QM and PM modules are used to check the quality of equipment, but I need the equipment on which the sample was tested to be linked to each inspection lot, for example for inspection type 05 and 09. Please tell me, is there any way to implement this?

This session aims to develop an understanding of AI-based innovations and how they support the evolving mandates of IT in supporting the business and enabling enterprise transformation. You will get a brief overview of the key AI innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and a sneak peak into the upcoming innovation topics.

entry.title: Re: NetWeaver upgrade from 7.4 to 7.5 Solman 7.2 system
entry.content:
Hi,

Please see the NW versions for different solution manager SP: 2771041 - SAP Solution Manager 7.2: Support Package stack levels

SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP 19
ABAP stack
- SAP NETWEAVER 7.4 - Application Server ABAP SP30
JAVA Stack
- Support Package Stack 28 of SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 Application Server JAVA

SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP 14
ABAP stack
- SAP NETWEAVER 7.4 - Application Server ABAP SP26
JAVA Stack
- Support Package Stack 21 of SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 Application Server JAVA

There was no NW version change during the SP14 to SP19 upgrade. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

KLICK 

regards Lothar

Vaishali Porthi

entry.title: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their restrictions
entry.content:
Hello there!

Seeking your insights and suggestions please. Currently our client who has 2 businesses, 1 will be sold for the next 3 months temporarily, SAP architecture will be the same. What would be the requirements, restrictions, compliance to ensure that the sold business cannot access the other. In terms of the organizational level, all of the areas are restricted except for the business area, will this cause of risks? or can we stay it the same?

krishnaveni.

entry.title: Re: DRF IDocs Issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

It's not an issue with DRF, but with idoc configuration on target system under tcode: WE20. 

Refer to step by step guide for IDOC configuration here: STEPS for creating IDOC . - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP build work zone, Custom Visualization of Tile is...
entry.content: Hi @ArunJacob I was able to achieve it. Please find my blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/custom-tile-visualization-amp-navigation-in-sap-build-workzone-cloud/ba-p/14087171

entry.title: Re: Natively ABAP Cloud (Clean Core) Add-ons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
@Marco_Valencia,

The Scalable Delivery option is a great step forward as it encourages partners to build on-stack ABAP add-ons for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and makes it easier for customers to discover and consume them through a centralised SAP Store experience.

Regarding the statement:

"Until December 2024, packaged ABAP Cloud add-ons were only available for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition. Now, they are natively available as clean-core solutions for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud!"

It’s worth clarifying that delivering ABAP add-ons for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has been possible since at least 2023 via the Multi-off Delivery approach.

Importantly, regardless of the delivery method, all add-ons for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition must follow the ABAP Cloud model — meaning they are clean core by design.

entry.title: Insights into the SAP Cloud ERP Private Package Update - AM
entry.content: In this session attendees will gain valuable insights into the latest Cloud ERP strategy and how it fits into the context of the new SAP Business Suite. Get an overview of the latest Cloud ERP offerings available and learn about the included business applications, tools and services as well as optimization and extensibility applications and how these will support your ERP transformation projects.

entry.title: Insights into the SAP Cloud ERP Private Package Update - PM
entry.content: In this session attendees will gain valuable insights into the latest Cloud ERP strategy and how it fits into the context of the new SAP Business Suite. Get an overview of the latest Cloud ERP offerings available and learn about the included business applications, tools and services as well as optimization and extensibility applications and how these will support your ERP transformation projects.

entry.title: Unlocking Success in Digital Transformation: An Insightful Webcast on SAP Integrated Toolchain - AM
entry.content: Join our upcoming webcast to explore the power and potential of the SAP Integrated Toolchain within the RISE with SAP Methodology. Ideal for businesses undertaking IT modernization, this session will present the step-by-step approach to implementing a clean core for incremental business value. Learn about the rich repository of tools like SAP Signavio, LeanIX, Tricentis, WalkMe, and SAP Cloud ALM, that support various stages of the SAP transformation journey, from initial discovery to running the final solution. From landscape analysis and process improvement to user enablement, the toolchain covers it all. Register now to ensure your trip towards stellar digital transformation success.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One SLD Error
entry.content:
Hi Underdog 

Please restart SLD services and if still you will have same issue , please follow the steps of SAP Note 2788059 to perform a clean reinstall of SAP Business One, version for MSSQL Server Tools.

Still having issue, please report incident using component SBO-BC-SLD.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP SNOW INTEGARATION INBOUND IDOC using CREMAS Msg.t...
entry.content: The only interface i am aware off is sending ALEAUD messages where you have to configure in BD64 for which receiver / messages you want it. Then you have to start report RBDSTATE  (Transaction BDM8) in a Batch-Job that issues all status of the IDOCs processed for a range of calendar days.

entry.title: Re: Hide standard Create /Delete button on loading RAP ap...
entry.content: All right, then it seems we need to work from the UI Annotation level, can you try "@ui.createHidden: true" annotation ? There is also a solution mentioned over the below Thread where they are asking to make use of "features : Global" just like we have "features : Instance" for getting this requirement done. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-create-button-still-enabled-after-disabling-the-feature/qaq-p/13733494

entry.title: Can a theme be set default for a specific user by the launchpad admin in SAP Gateway?
entry.content:
Can a theme be set default for a specific user by the launchpad admin in SAP Gateway? if so how?

Can personalisation settings be changed for a specific user? Basically i want to change theme for a particular user from gateway and disable him from editing it further

entry.title: Re: Real-Time Salesforce Integration with SAP CI: Introducing Salesforce Pub/Sub Adapter
entry.content: Hi @Punith_Oswal  Thank you for sharing ! Can we practice these scenario using SAP IS trial account and also for salesforce is there any subscription needed.

entry.title: Re: Implementing Event-Driven Architecture with Canonical Data Model in SAP CPI
entry.content: Informative and well-articulated.This post added real value—thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: S4/HANA Readiness Check Issue
entry.content:
Hello dear,

 

If your note 2758146 version > = 126 and note 2399707 version >= 131, then please ignore the message. It's a bug in that case, we're fixing.

 

If not, they you'd better update 2758146 and/or 2399707 to the latest version and execute the RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA again.

Then create a new analysis with the latest result or update to the same analysis again.

 

Best regards,

Bill

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR
entry.content: The duration for revenue distribution is defined by start date and end date that RAR registers on POB level. To understand the root cause of the issue raised some further clarifcations would be required: 1) Start and end dates for the POB in RAR define 12 month or 10 month length? 2) What is the source (integration via SD, external, etc.) of data, and the exact input data that is being provided to RAR

entry.title: Re: Conditionally Disable a field in 2-step maintenance t...
entry.content:
Hello @Maciej__Galica ,

I know the easiest way could be making the changes in PBO or PAI. I just thought is there any TMG event will support this requirement. Thanks for the response

Thanks,

Anish Emil Godson R

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition FPS03 Highlights – AI, Automation & Usability Innovations
entry.content:
Join us for an in-depth webcast showcasing the latest innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS03. This session will spotlight powerful new Joule and AI-driven features, and usability enhancements in core business areas designed to transform business operations and drive efficiency.

Highlights include:

- AI-assisted journal upload for streamlined financial processes
-Predictive labor demand planning to optimize warehouse and resource management
- AI-based scheduling optimizer explanations for intuitive production planning
- Enhanced integration with SAP’s unified copilot Joule, expanding automation and transactional capabilities across finance, procurement, sales, service,
and asset management
- Usability improvements and new functionalities across core business areas (e.g. Manufacturing, Asset Management)

entry.title: Re: Publishing to a Queue or Topic in BTP Event Mesh using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @hjshin,

how did you try to authorize when doing the POST call?
Did you first fetch the JWT token and re-use the same for posting the message to the queue?

Regards,
Tobias

entry.title: How to use two destinations in SAP ui5 app
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to build the SAP Ui5 app using two destinations. 

 

Regards,

M.Rao

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition FPS03 Highlights – AI, Automation & Usability Innovations - PM
entry.content:
Join us for an in-depth webcast showcasing the latest innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS03. This session will spotlight powerful new Joule and AI-driven features, and usability enhancements in core business areas designed to transform business operations and drive efficiency.

Highlights include:

- AI-assisted journal upload for streamlined financial processes
- Predictive labor demand planning to optimize warehouse and resource management
- AI-based scheduling optimizer explanations for intuitive production planning
- Enhanced integration with SAP’s unified copilot Joule, expanding automation and transactional capabilities across finance, procurement, sales, service,
and asset management
- Usability improvements and new functionalities across core business areas (e.g. Manufacturing, Asset Management)

entry.title: Analysis for Microsoft Office compatible with Microsoft Office 2024
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

The SAP packages listed below are currently not compatible with Microsoft Office 2024.

  1. SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office
  2. SAP BusinessObjects EPM addin for MS office Client
  3. SAP BusinessObjects Live Office
  4. SAP BW Business Explorer - for SAP GUI 8.0

The above components are working fine when users are using Microsoft office 2016. After migrating to Microsoft Office 2024, the above applications are not working. Could you please guide me or share what are the required steps we need to perform to make the above applications to work.

Thanks.

entry.title: F5987 does not show billing plan for monthly billing item
entry.content:
Hello,

When working with new version of FIORI app Manage Sales Contract 2, I miss contract data on the Header and Item, I'm not able to specify neither installation nor acceptance date. I got error saying that FIORI app does not work with contract data. When I disable this setup, I can save my contract, but the billing  plan is not visible in the FIORI app. Could you please explain why these 2 functionalities are not supported? Do you know if and when we can expect them to be available in FIORI:

  • contract data on header/item
  • periodic billing plan

/Tomasz

entry.content: Thanks for the tip, i already had used a searchengine, but the solution provided has not worked for me.

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display

entry.title: Re: WalkMe Now Available in SAP SuccessFactors : A New Era of Digital Adoption

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Hi Icpaiva

Thanks for your reply. I am able to set the desired rows in edit mode. My question was related to influencing ALV toolbar after refresh table display method call.

Thanks

entry.title: A Dialogue on Artificial Intelligence
entry.content:
This week, the SAP Studio became a space for focused and open dialogue on a topic that is shaping our future today: Artificial Intelligence, and how we can develop and use it responsibly.

As part of our Tech Lounge, diverse expert perspectives came together to explore the intersections of technology, ethics, and society. No slides, no lectures – but a real conversation at eye level, live from the studio with participants both on-site and online.

Our speakers:

  • Andrea Martin, IBM Distinguished Engineer, CTO Ecosystem & Association, IBM DACH

  • Dilek Sezgün, Techsales Manager for AI, Data and Open Source, IBM DACH

  • Vanessa Micelli-Schmidt, Ph.D., Chief Product Manager, SAP Business Technology Platform

They shared insights on practical implementation, governance, and the cultural dimensions of AI – highlighting both opportunities and challenges.

Three key takeaways from the discussion:

  1. Technology alone is not enough. AI requires ethical frameworks, accountability, and cross-disciplinary collaboration.

  2. Diverse teams and perspectives lead to better decisions – and greater trust in technology.

  3. Open dialogue spaces provide orientation, clarity, and shared learning.

What’s your perspective?
How is AI shaping your work environment – and what questions are top of mind for you? We look forward to your thoughts and input in the comments.

entry.title: Re: Multi Action and Conditionals
entry.content: There is no condition setting possibility in multi action. I would recommend to achieve this check in the second  data action with advanced formula.

entry.title: Re: sl_datafoundation.jar found missing
entry.content:
In the directory ".......\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\SL SDK\eclipse\plugins", you will find all the necessary com.sap.sl JAR files.
The datafoundation classes are located within com.sap.sl.tools.jar

..

I hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere graphical view deployment issue
entry.content:
Hello,
I've redeployed all successor view which had errors, and now it looks ok. But during that I've created a couple of copies of my first view and some of its successors, because sometimes successor (L1) view also has its own successor (L2) with error, so I can't just redeploy successor (L1). In that case I made a copy of successor (L1) replace original (L1) in (L2), redeploy (L2), redeploy (L1) and so on.

I understand that idea above is not an option for you, but did you try just redeploy every view in which your dimension view is used? Or are there a lot of views for that idea?

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks a bunch for your reply. Your solution worked perfectly. As you rightly said, below code was the reason behind standard ALV toolbar icons showing up post refresh table display method call.

IF go_grid->is_ready_for_input( ) EQ 0.

CALL METHOD go_grid->set_ready_for_input

EXPORTING

i_ready_for_input = 1.

ENDIF.

I simply followed your suggestion and it worked like a magic. To sum up, given below are the steps performed:

Step 1) Set ALV layout parameter EDIT as 'X'. This will open up the entire ALV for editing. Since my reqmt is to keep the whole ALV as display only to begin with, I did step 2.

Step 2) For each cell in ALV row, set the celltab as disabled. This made the entire ALV as display only during initial ALV output. 

Step 3) User selects 1 or more rows and clicks edit button. At this point, we open up only the selected rows for editing by setting the celltab as enabled. Since the layout is already set as EDIT mode in step 1, I didn't have to call is_ready_for_input method again in PAI. 

Step 4) The initial ALV toolbar with the excluded ALV toolbar icons is perfectly retained on the screen post PAI and refresh table display method call. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: How to create a custom email template with a custom CDS view as Data Source?
entry.content: Hi, I have done in the same way. Its ended with invalid data source error & with error in sending email even after I'm getting email in real time mail boxes.

entry.title: Re: Creating a sales order with reference to an automatic purchase order via IDoc
entry.content: Thank you for the guide. This practical approach not only enhances our understanding but also aids in implementing efficient solutions in real-world scenarios. Image resolution seemed ok to me.

entry.title: Re: JARs to develop groovy locally
entry.content: Hi, anyone developing goorvy scripts locally?
